center.id: loc-南乔治亚和南桑威奇群岛-5634c915
center.name: 南乔治亚和南桑威奇群岛
center.summary: 南乔治亚和南桑威奇群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括长眉企鹅、Grey-backed storm petrel、Black-bellied storm petrel等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in colonies on the Auckland Islands, Heard Island, Macquarie Island, Scott Island, South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands, the South Orkney Islands, South Shetland Islands, Crozet Islands, and the Kerguelen Islands. When not breeding, it ranges throughout the southern oceans.{{Cite journal |last1=Shepherd |first1=Lara D

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Antarctica, Argentina, Australia, Bouvet Island, Brazil, Chile, Falkland Islands, French Polynesia, French Southern Territories, Madagascar, Mozambique, New Zealand, Oman, Peru, Saint Helena, São Tomé and Príncipe, Solomon Islands, South Africa, South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands, Uruguay, and Vanuatu

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is monotypic within the genus Garrodia. It is found in Antarctica, Argentina, Australia, Chile, Falkland Islands, French Southern Territories, New Zealand, Saint Helena, South Africa, and South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|200px|A colony climbing in Cooper Island (South Georgia)|Cooper Bay, South Georgia A 1993 review estimated that the macaroni was the most abundant species of penguin, with a minimum of 11,841,600 pairs worldwide. Macaroni penguins range from the Subantarctic to the Antarctic Peninsula; at least 216 breeding colonies at 50 sites have been recorded. In South America, macaroni penguins are found in southern Chile, the Falkland Islands, South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands, and South Orkney Islands
